context: Tests whether the agent correctly uses the ElevenLabs JavaScript SDK — specifically the correct npm package, correct client class import, correct API method, proper loop usage with the v2 model, and authentication via environment variable.

checklist.name: Correct npm package
checklist.description: Package.json or install command uses @elevenlabs/elevenlabs-js, not the deprecated elevenlabs package

checklist.name: No deprecated package
checklist.description: Does NOT import from or install the old elevenlabs npm package (no 'from elevenlabs' in JS, no 'require("elevenlabs")')

checklist.name: Correct JS method
checklist.description: Calls client.textToSoundEffects.convert() to generate sound effects

checklist.name: Loop with v2 model
checklist.description: When loop: true is used, the model_id is eleven_text_to_sound_v2 (or omitted, relying on the v2 default)

checklist.name: Environment variable auth
checklist.description: Uses ELEVENLABS_API_KEY environment variable for authentication — does NOT hardcode an API key string

checklist.name: Valid duration range
checklist.description: Any duration_seconds value specified is between 0.5 and 30 (inclusive); null is also acceptable

checklist.name: Audio written to file
checklist.description: Generated audio stream is piped or written to a file (e.g. using createWriteStream or fs.writeFile)

checklist.name: Text parameter present
checklist.description: Each convert() call includes a text parameter describing the desired sound effect
